imageAlt: Amazon Delivery Date + 7 (DD+7) Update roadmap item preview image
title: Amazon Delivery Date + 7 (DD+7) Update
summaryBody:
Based on output from the linked RFD below, we will update our KB articles to communicate out stance on the current issue identified by all 3rd party integrators in the UK who pull Amazon data, thus unblocking our marketing push. 
This project does not provide any material change to the functionality offered by the integration.
detailBody:
Based on output from the linked RFD below, we will update our KB articles to communicate out stance on the current issue identified by all 3rd party integrators in the UK who pull Amazon data, thus unblocking our marketing push. 
This project does not provide any material change to the functionality offered by the integration.
